entry.title: Lissy93 unlabeled an issue in dashy
entry.content:
Lissy93 unlabeled an issue in Lissy93/dashy · April 8, 2026 16:08
[FEATURE_REQUEST] Update to Vue3 (Vue2 is EOL) #1618
